headline: APPS Stock Declines 10% in a Month: Time to Buy, Sell or Hold?
summary: Digital Turbine shares fall 10% in a month, lagging peers. But growth in the ODS and AGP segments and rising advertiser demand offer resilience despite fierce ad-tech competition.
